business_description.nature_of_business: Industrial real estate investment and management — warehouse, distribution, and light manufacturing facilities throughout Ohio

positives: Fire alarms hard-wired with central station monitoring
Written contracts with indemnification required from all contractors
Recent system updates: Plumbing 2015, HVAC 2018, Electrical 2023
Zero claims in prior three policy years (2022, 2023, 2024)
No policy cancellations in prior three years
Short-term rentals (less than 1 year) permitted — indicates active leasing
Commercial occupancy within the building confirmed
concerns: Building not fully sprinklered per NFPA 13 or 13R across entire portfolio (LOC-007 not sprinklered)
No written contracts with all subcontractors
Material Safety Data Sheets (MSDS) not maintained
LOC-007 (3250 Hill Avenue, Toledo, OH) is a 1998 Manufacturing facility with no sprinklers
LOC-004 (2100 Kuntz Road, Dayton, OH) is a 1992 Manufacturing facility — oldest in portfolio
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Zero claims reported across three prior policy years (2022, 2023, 2024) with carriers Chubb Limited, Hartford Financial Services, and Liberty Mutual Insurance. No cancellations in any year.

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Industrial real estate investment and management — warehouse, distribution, and light manufacturing facilities throughout Ohio. Hours of Operation: Mon-Fri 8:00 AM - 6:00 PM, Sat 9:00 AM - 1:00 PM. 95 full-time employees, 18 part-time employees. Annual revenue of $48,000,000. 31 years in business, 22 years with current management.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: Formal safety program in place. Fire alarms hard-wired with central station monitoring. Written contracts with indemnification required from all contractors. 24-hour doorperson or security on premises. No lockout/tagout procedures in place. No MSDS maintained.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: No claims reported in 2022, 2023, or 2024. Prior carriers: Chubb Limited (2022, $456,514.10 premium), Hartford Financial Services (2023, $419,914.35 premium), Liberty Mutual Insurance (2024, $392,002.31 premium). No cancellations in any year.
